summary: Discovered 7 verified official sources: student AI guide (PDF), CLEAR generative AI page, library AI guide, ITSC Copilot Chat Basic, ITSC M365 Copilot Premium, ITSC AI Hub, and academic honesty declaration. Rejected 5 sources: staff guidelines (login required), research policy (login required), 2 research publications (research showcase only), 1 course page (low policy specificity).
